allow: Bash(mysql -u root ecde_4 -N -e "SELECT id, school_name, ward_id FROM ecde_schools LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u root ecde_4 -N -e "SELECT id, name, ward_id FROM sub_locations LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u root ecde_4 -N -e "SELECT id, first_name, last_name, admission_number, dob, school_id, ward_id FROM learners LIMIT 10;")
Bash(mysql -u root ecde_4 -N -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\), SUM\(admission_number IS NULL\), SUM\(dob IS NULL\) FROM learners;")
Bash(mysql -u root ecde_4 -N -e "SELECT id, school_name FROM ecde_schools WHERE ward_id='q38k1nKzsRS' ORDER BY school_name;")
Bash(mysql -u root ecde_4 -N -e "SELECT w.name, COUNT\(*\) FROM ecde_schools s JOIN wards w ON w.id = s.ward_id GROUP BY w.name;")
